Description: Define expected interfaces in commonMain and actual implementations per platform
Do: Use expect/actual for platform APIs; keep business logic in commonMain; minimize platform-specific code
Dont: Duplicate business logic per platform; put UI code in shared module
Code Bad: // Duplicating logic\n// androidApp/Repository.kt - same as iosApp/Repository.swift

Description: Ktor client for shared HTTP networking with platform-specific engines
Do: Use Ktor with CIO/Darwin engines; define API client in commonMain; use kotlinx.serialization
Dont: Use platform-specific HTTP clients in shared code; use Retrofit in commonMain
Code Bad: // Using Retrofit in shared - Android only\nval retrofit = Retrofit.Builder()... // Won't compile for iOS

Description: Type-safe SQL database that generates Kotlin APIs from SQL statements for all platforms
Do: Write SQL in .sq files; use generated type-safe APIs; share DB schema across platforms
Dont: Use Room in shared code; write raw SQL strings
Code Bad: // Raw SQL in shared code\nval cursor = db.rawQuery('SELECT * FROM products', null)\n// No type safety, no cross-platform

Description: Koin dependency injection works across KMP without annotation processing
Do: Define modules in commonMain; use platform-specific modules for actual implementations
Dont: Use Hilt in shared code; use expect/actual for every dependency manually

Description: Write tests in commonTest that run on all platforms using kotlin.test
Do: Use kotlin.test assertions; mock with interfaces; test business logic in commonTest
Dont: Test only on one platform; skip commonTest; use JUnit-only APIs in shared tests
